audit_items.proof_trace: In remote_recv_cb's send error path (line 856-859), close_and_free_remote(remote) frees the remote struct, but no return statement follows, causing execution to continue to line 870 where setsockopt(remote->fd, ...) dereferences the freed pointer.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Client disconnects while server is sending response, causing send() to fail with an error, triggering the use-after-free of remote->fd via setsockopt after free.
